arts.ttl: Real Madrid fume over refereeing once again during Atlético clash
arts.sum: All associated with La Liga champions Real Madrid have on Saturday night once more made clear their grievances with the standard of officiating in Spain. This comes owing to developments…

arts.sum: A member of the midfield ranks at La Liga giants Real Madrid may have been lucky to escape a red card during the club’s latest outing. The player in question?…

arts.ttl: Arsenal's transfer condition for allowing William Saliba to join Real Madrid emerges
arts.sum: William Saliba has been a target for Real Madrid for some time, but Arsenal's stance on the French international defender has become clear amid interest from Spain

arts.ttl: Atlético close in on contract renewals for Barrios, Giuliano Simeone
arts.sum: Some news courtesy of Relevo’s Matteo Moretto: Atlético Madrid are advancing in negotiations to sign budding stars Pablo Barrios and Giuliano Simeone to new contracts. The report comes hours before Atlético face Real Madrid in a city derby that could see the Rojiblancos leapfrog Los Blancos for first place in LaLiga.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid v Atlético Madrid: La Liga – live
arts.sum: La Liga updates, 8pm GMT kick-off at the Bernabéu Live scoreboard | And you can send Dom an email Elsewhere in La Liga Athletic Club de Bilbao continued their hot-streak with a commanding 3-0 home win over fellow top four hopefuls Girona today, while Celta Vigo beat Real Betis 3-2 in a mid-table clash – despite a goal from on-loan Manchester United man Antony. Villarreal boosted their European hopes with a 2-1 win at Las Palmas. You wonder whether Pep Guardiola and Manchester City will be watching on tonight, given they welcome Real Madrid to the Etihad on Tuesday night for the first leg of their marquee Champions League playoff tie. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Team News: Jude Bellingham, Kylian Mbappe decisions made as Real Madrid confirm XI for Madrid derby
arts.sum: Real Madrid and Atletico Madrid confirm their starting sides for Saturday's Madrid derby at Bernabeu, with the top two in La Liga set to meet for a fascinating battle.

arts.ttl: Man City facing anxious wait on Nico Gonzalez ahead of Real Madrid showdown in Champions League
arts.sum: Manchester City head coach Pep Guardiola 'does not know' whether Nico Gonzalez is facing a spell on the sidelines with the knock that he suffered on his debut.

arts.ttl: CONFIRMED lineups: Real Madrid vs Atletico de Madrid, 2025 La Liga
arts.sum: Real Madrid starting XI: Courtois, Vazquez, Asencio, Tchouameni, Garcia, Valverde, Ceballos, Bellingham, Rodrygo, Vinicius, Mbappe. As expected, Asencio and Tchouameni will start in the center of Real Madrid’s defensive line tonight.
